title: centrosema bifidum
intro: Centrosema bifidum, also known as sensitive plant, is a perennial legume native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. It is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have antiseptic and antifungal properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal benefits.
